name: MERIDIAN
intro: Meridian is a forward-thinking architecture firm based in Los Angeles. We developed a complete brand identity and digital presence — from wordmark and visual system to a fully custom website that mirrors the precision and scale of their built work.

name: KOVA HEALTH
intro: Kova Health is redefining preventive care with a data-first approach. We built a brand identity that balances clinical credibility with human warmth, paired with a product UI that makes complex health data feel approachable and actionable.

name: ATLAS LABS
intro: Atlas Labs builds developer tools for the next generation of AI infrastructure. We designed and built their marketing site and product UI — a system that communicates technical depth without sacrificing clarity or speed.

name: SONRA
intro: Sonra is a fintech platform enabling real-time cross-border payments for emerging markets. We delivered a full brand identity alongside a product design system — balancing regulatory gravity with an interface that feels fast, trustworthy, and borderless.

name: LUMEN STUDIO
intro: Lumen Studio is an independent production company specializing in architectural and interior photography. We crafted a minimal brand identity and portfolio site that puts the work at the center — precise, quiet, and luminous.

name: AURA
intro: Aura is an AI-powered ambient display platform for physical spaces. We developed the brand identity, motion design language, and generative visual system — a living aesthetic that responds to data and environment in real time.
